Shortcuts for execution (Windows + GCC):

```sh
gcc ./limit_test.c && ./a.exe
```

```sh
gcc ./calculating_factorials.c && ./a.exe
```

Note: can change the number whose factorial we want (in `calculating_factorials.c`) by changing the constant.
